name: @example/supabase-edge-mcp
description: Full SolvaPay MCP server running on Supabase Edge Functions — `createSolvaPayMcpFetchHandler` over Deno. Ships the same paywalled demo toolbox as `mcp-checkout-app`, deployed at the network edge.

scripts.build: cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && cp dist/mcp-app.html supabase/functions/mcp/mcp-app.html
scripts.validate: pnpm -w build:packages && pnpm build && deno check --config=supabase/functions/mcp/deno.local.json supabase/functions/mcp/index.ts
